details.test: Task 1: Cheapest Family Night session 2A2C to cart
Task 3: Accessibility info and accessibility inquiry submission
Task 4: Sensory-friendly Saturday morning session 1A1C to cart without add-ons
Task 5: Group booking for 15 with discount and pay-on-arrival-type payment
Task 6: Newsletter subscription weekly, family activities + special offers
Task 7: Choose best ticket type (General vs VIP) for 2 adults and add to cart
Task 8: Late-night bus route and transportation contact message
